//: Example vinyan.json fragment demonstrating how to add custom specialist agents.
//2: Drop these entries into the `agents` array of your vinyan.json, then scaffold soul files via `vinyan agent create <id>`.
//3: The built-ins (ts-coder, writer, system-designer, secretary) are always available and don't need to be listed here.

agents.name: Java Coder
agents.description: Java/Kotlin specialist for Spring, gradle, and JVM tooling tasks.

agents.name: CEO
agents.description: Strategic advisor — reasons about product direction, stakeholder framing, and business trade-offs.

agents.name: CTO
agents.description: Technology architect — reasons about tech strategy, architectural trade-offs, and team-wide engineering decisions without mutating code.

agents.name: Accountant
agents.description: Numeric reconciliation specialist — reads CSV / XLSX / ledgers and reasons about accounting integrity (no mutations).

agents.name: Novelist
agents.description: Creative prose specialist — long-form fiction, narrative voice, character consistency.
